verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I come to You Let my heart be changed, renewed Flowing from the grace That I've found in You Lord I've come to know The weaknesses I see in me Will be stripped away By the power of Your love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hold me close Let Your love surround me Bring me near Draw me to Your side And as I wait I'll rise up like the eagle And I will soar with You Your Spirit leads me on By the power of Your love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord unveil my eyes Let me see You face to face The knowledge of Your love As You live in me Lord renew my mind As Your will unfolds in my life In living every day By the power of Your love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hold me close Let Your love surround me Bring me near Draw me to Your side And as I wait I'll rise up like the eagle And I will soar with You Your Spirit leads me on By the power of Your love

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hold me close Let Your love surround me Bring me near Draw me to Your side And as I wait I'll rise up like the eagle And I will soar with You Your Spirit leads me on By the power of Your love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I will soar with You Your Spirit leads me on By the power of Your love And I will soar with You Your Spirit leads me on By the power of Your love
